system.powerDescription:
As part of any action you may manifest one of the following appendages of a from a surface in range. If the use of any appendages would require a roll it uses your skills. You take any stress inflicted to these appendages. 

• ARM: Covered in suction cups and dripping, this arm may extend up to CAT distance away from you. 
• MAW: Serrated teeth crunch an object you are touching with force equal to 1/2 CAT. 
• BULB: Blinding light strong enough to bathe CAT area is produced from a fleshy lamp. 

Gain or grant +1D when you next take advantage of this power. This power may alter the parameters of rolls whilst active
